S

search(CollegeBean, int, int) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.CollegeModel
Executes highly targeted database search queries based on conditional parameters provided within the filter bean.
search(CourseBean, int, int) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.CourseModel
Executes highly targeted database search queries based on conditional parameters provided within the filter bean.
search(FacultyBean, int, int) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.FacultyModel
Executes highly targeted database search queries based on conditional parameters provided within the filter bean.
search(MarksheetBean, int, int) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.MarksheetModel
Executes highly targeted database search queries based on conditional parameters provided within the filter bean.
search(RoleBean, int, int) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.RoleModel
Searches and filters Role records dynamically based on provided criteria with built-in support for pagination.
search(StudentBean, int, int) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.StudentModel
Searches and filters Student records dynamically based on provided criteria with built-in support for SQL pagination.
search(SubjectBean, int, int) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.SubjectModel
Searches and filters Subject records dynamically based on provided criteria with built-in support for SQL pagination boundaries.
search(TimetableBean, int, int) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.TimetableModel
Performs dynamic searches for records matching criteria within parameters, supporting pagination configurations.
search(UserBean, int, int) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.UserModel
Searches users with filters and pagination.
semester - Variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.bean.TimetableBean
Semester of the examination.
sendMail(EmailMessage) - Static method in class in.co.rays.proj4.util.EmailUtility
Sends an email to a single or multiple comma-separated recipients using data properties populated within an EmailMessage instance.
service(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.BaseCtl
Handles all client requests and performs preprocessing tasks such as validation and preloading.
